name: Tomato, Caper, Olive and Blue Cheese Salad
recipeInstructions:
1. Arrange the sliced tomatoes on a large platter.
2. Drizzle with balsamic vinegar.
3. Drizzle with olive oil.
4. Sprinkle very lightly with salt.
5. Sprinkle generously with pepper.
6. Sprinkle with halved Kalamata olives, crumbled blue cheese, and drained capers.
7. If desired, sprinkle with chopped anchovies.
8. Garnish with fresh basil leaves and serve.
6 Servings
Bon Appétit August 1995
